status_summary: Phase 1 adapter hardening complete but with regressed typecheck (baseline 243 → final 280, +37), 5 defects deferred, C8 unmet, 1 repair cycle applied.
known_defects_deferred: DrizzleLikeClient interface gaps: select() needs optional fields param, selectDistinct() missing, broad any return types propagate type unsafety. Repaired in Phase 1 repair cycle.

afterCommit error isolation: Database.transaction effects drain loop lacks try/catch, causing one failing callback to abort chain and trigger retry. Documented in step 1.4 test finding. Postponed to Phase 2.
12 remaining raw Database.* calls in 6 files: data-migration.ts(4), project.ts(3), workspace.ts(1), projectors.ts(1), fence.ts(1), sync/index.ts(2). Deferred per plan.
243 pre-existing typecheck errors (Effect v4 beta Layer R-type mismatches in test files). Not caused by this phase.

6 remaining regression errors from Phase 1 repair cycle: select() field parameter rejected at 4 workspace.ts call sites, selectDistinct() missing from DrizzleLikeClient, TransactionOptions not accepting { behavior } object at project.ts(231).

repairs_applied: DrizzleLikeClient.select() signature widened to accept optional fields
DrizzleLikeClient.all() and get() use generic type parameter
TransactionOptions accepts plain { behavior } objects as backward-compatible fallback
